name: framebench
description: Local camera capture and labeling tool for coding agents working on hardware.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && node scripts/copy-preload.mjs && vite build
scripts.release:check: node scripts/generate-icons.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && node scripts/copy-preload.mjs && vite build && node scripts/run-tests.mjs
scripts.package: node scripts/generate-icons.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && node scripts/copy-preload.mjs && vite build && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: node scripts/generate-icons.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && node scripts/copy-preload.mjs && vite build && electron-builder
scripts.dist:mac: node scripts/generate-icons.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && node scripts/copy-preload.mjs && vite build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:win: node scripts/generate-icons.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && node scripts/copy-preload.mjs && vite build && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:linux: node scripts/generate-icons.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && node scripts/copy-preload.mjs && vite build && electron-builder --linux

extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: FrameBench uses the camera to capture hardware bench images, label crops, and burst samples for local inspection.
